name: ACE In The Hole, LLC
about: ACE In The Hole offers a range of sports and activities, with a focus on golf and sports simulators located in Randolph, Wisconsin. The venue provides a climate-controlled environment for up to 8 people per simulator, making it suitable for groups, individuals, and events. While specific technology brands are not mentioned, it features simulators for various activities, including golf and zombie dodgeball, with pricing structured per hour for both weekday and weekend usage. It is positioned as an all-weather alternative for golfers and sports enthusiasts, accommodating everything from casual play to large group parties and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather golf simulation regardless of outdoor conditions
Affordable per-hour pricing for individuals and groups
Flexible booking options for short or long sessions
Private space for focused practice or social events
Variety of simulator activities beyond traditional golf

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed as cash is the only payment method with an ATM on-site
No alcohol service explicitly mentioned; BYOB likely allowed as cash is the only payment method with an ATM on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue appears to be cash-only with an ATM on-site. While not explicitly stated, it is common for BYOB (bring your own beverages) at such facilities, but food policies are unclear.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a standard time for an 18-hole simulation. However, since pricing is per hour, the duration would depend on your pace and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, ACE In The Hole advertises itself as suitable for events like birthday parties and mentions activities like zombie dodgeball, indicating a family-friendly environment.
